Interzenex MicrofinanceBack to home

Cookie Policy

Last updated: June 2026

Interzenex Microfinance uses a minimal set of cookies necessary to operate the platform securely. We do not use advertising cookies or sell cookie data to third parties.

CookieTypePurposeOpt-out
session_tokenEssentialKeeps you logged in during your browser session. Expires when you close your browser or after 24 hours of inactivity.No — required to use the platform.
csrf_tokenEssentialPrevents cross-site request forgery attacks on your account.No — required for security.
_analyticsAnalyticsHelps us understand which features are used most, so we can improve the platform. No personally identifiable information is included.Yes — disable in your browser settings.
theme_prefPreferenceStores your display preferences (e.g., collapsed sidebar state).Yes — clearing your cookies will reset preferences.

To manage cookies, use your browser's built-in privacy settings. For questions, contact privacy@interzenexmicrofinance.online.
